agent_email_extract_non-nlp
  • Overview

Overview

agent_email_extract_non-nlp provides agent capabilities for the Vionerae platform.

Business Goals

  • Deliver a consistent, reusable agent integration surface

  • Provide predictable run behavior and structured outputs

  • Support shell-driven discovery and execution

Business Lens Alignment

This project aligns implementation priorities to the executive briefs captured in docs/business_lens.rst.
